TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Pekus ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Tayto go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 24 buwan, 41 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 32% kyan ku 13 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 68% kyan ku 28 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 32%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pekus hya' ga Toruy. tay mkyahu' na Pekus hya' ga cinaw. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pekus~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ɣiraŋ keŋ atu tajto ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na pekus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa toruj. taj mkjaħuʔ na pekus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨinaw. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Pekus ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Tayto go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 24 buwan, 41 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 32% kyan ku 13 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 68% kyan ku 28 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 32%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pekus hya' ga Toruy. tay mkyahu' na Pekus hya' ga cinaw. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pekus~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ɣiraŋ keŋ atu tajto ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na pekus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa toruj. taj mkjaħuʔ na pekus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨinaw. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
